# HyperFrames

## Docs

- [App Showcase](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/app-showcase.md): Fitness app product showcase with three floating smartphone screens
- [Apple Money Count](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/apple-money-count.md): Apple-style finance counter that counts from $0 to $10,000, flashes green, and bursts money icons with sound.
- [Blue Sweater Intro Video](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/blue-sweater-intro-video.md): Warm AI creator intro sequence that resolves into an X follow card for @_blue_sweater_.
- [Chromatic Radial Split](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/chromatic-radial-split.md): Shader transition with chromatic aberration radial split
- [Cinematic Zoom](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/cinematic-zoom.md): Shader transition with dramatic zoom blur
- [Code 3D Extrude](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-3d-extrude.md): Syntax-highlighted code on a lit, beveled 3D slab that rotates through real space and settles to a readable rest — true WebGL depth and lighting, not a 2D transform.
- [Code Diff](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-diff.md): An edit shown as a colored diff — removed lines collapse in red, added lines expand in green.
- [Code Highlight Sweep](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-highlight.md): A highlight band sweeps across a target line while the surrounding context dims — draws the eye to one line.
- [Code Morph](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-morph.md): One snippet transforms into another — tokens glide between positions, leavers fade out, enterers fade in. Shiki Magic Move re-driven as a paused GSAP timeline.
- [Code Particle Assemble](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-particle-assemble.md): Thousands of GPU points scatter through space and fly to the exact glyph pixels of the code, resolving into readable syntax-highlighted text — a particle system, not a token tween.
- [Code Scroll To Line](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-scroll.md): The camera scrolls a long file to bring a target line to center and spotlights it — for walking through real modules.
- [Code Shader Dissolve](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-shader-dissolve.md): The code compiles into existence: a GPU fragment shader resolves it out of seeded noise with a chromatic dissolve front and edge glow, then holds crisp.
- [Apple Terminal Basic](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-basic.md): Apple Terminal Basic profile with white background and black text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Clear Dark](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-clear-dark.md): Apple Terminal Clear Dark profile with semi-transparent dark background and white text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Clear Light](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-clear-light.md): Apple Terminal Clear Light profile with semi-transparent white background and black text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Grass](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-grass.md): Apple Terminal Grass profile with black background and bright green text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Homebrew](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-homebrew.md): Apple Terminal Homebrew profile with black background, bright green text and lime cursor, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Man Page](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-man-page.md): Apple Terminal Man Page profile with pale yellow background and black text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Novel](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-novel.md): Apple Terminal Novel profile with warm parchment background and dark brown text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Ocean](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-ocean.md): Apple Terminal Ocean profile with deep blue background and white text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Pro](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-pro.md): Apple Terminal Pro profile with black background, grey text and lime green cursor, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Red Sands](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-red-sands.md): Apple Terminal Red Sands profile with deep red background and sandy text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Silver Aerogel](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-silver-aerogel.md): Apple Terminal Silver Aerogel profile with dark grey background and white text, per-character typing animation.
- [Apple Terminal Solid Colors](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-apple-terminal-solid-colors.md): Apple Terminal Solid Colors profile with deep purple background and white text, per-character typing animation.
- [Dark 2026](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-dark-2026.md): The newest VS Code dark theme with refined token scopes and updated palette.
- [Dark Modern](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-dark-modern.md): The default dark theme — clean and contemporary with comfortable contrast.
- [Dark+](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-dark-plus.md): Classic dark theme with enhanced syntax highlighting for popular languages.
- [Code Snippet Flight](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-flight.md): Discrete code snippets fly in from the side and assemble into a stacked program, staggered. Block-level FLIP.
- [High Contrast](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-high-contrast.md): Maximum contrast dark theme for accessibility.
- [High Contrast Light](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-high-contrast-light.md): Maximum contrast light theme for accessibility.
- [Light 2026](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-light-2026.md): The newest VS Code light theme with refined token scopes and updated palette.
- [Light Modern](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-light-modern.md): The default light theme — a fresh, modern take on the classic VS light experience.
- [Light+](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-light-plus.md): Classic light theme with enhanced syntax highlighting for popular languages.
- [Monokai](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-monokai.md): The iconic warm-toned dark theme beloved by developers worldwide.
- [Solarized Light](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-solarized-light.md): Ethan Schoonover's precision-engineered light color scheme.
- [Visual Studio Dark](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-visual-studio-dark.md): The traditional Visual Studio dark color scheme.
- [Visual Studio Light](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-snippet-visual-studio-light.md): The traditional Visual Studio light color scheme.
- [Code Typing](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/code-typing.md): Token-streamed typing reveal with a caret that tracks the frontier — deterministic, no CSS animation.
- [Cross Warp Morph](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/cross-warp-morph.md): Shader transition with cross-warped morphing
- [Data Chart](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/data-chart.md): Animated bar + line chart with staggered reveal, NYT-style typography, and value labels
- [Domain Warp Dissolve](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/domain-warp-dissolve.md): Shader transition with fractal noise domain warping
- [Flash Through White](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/flash-through-white.md): Shader transition with white flash crossfade
- [Flowchart](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/flowchart.md): Animated decision tree with SVG connectors, sticky-note nodes, cursor interaction, and typing correction
- [Glitch](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/glitch.md): Shader transition with digital glitch artifacts
- [Gravitational Lens](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/gravitational-lens.md): Shader transition with gravitational lensing distortion
- [Instagram Follow](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/instagram-follow.md): Animated Instagram follow overlay with profile card and follow button
- [iOS 26 Liquid Glass Home Screen](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/ios26-liquid-glass.md): 3D iPhone with a normal iOS 26 home screen, liquid glass app icons, shader wallpaper, dock, and fluid glass notifications that drop from the status area onto a GLTF device model.
- [Light Leak](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/light-leak.md): Shader transition with cinematic light leak overlay
- [Liquid Glass Context Menu](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/liquid-glass-context-menu.md): Frosted glass context menu panel drifting over an aurora shader background
- [Liquid Glass Media Controls](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/liquid-glass-media-controls.md): Frosted glass media control panels spreading over an aurora shader background
- [Liquid Glass Notification](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/liquid-glass-notification.md): Frosted glass notification cards floating over an aurora shader background
- [Liquid Glass Widgets](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/liquid-glass-widgets.md): Frosted glass stat cards, showcase panel and pill chips over an aurora shader background
- [Logo Outro](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/logo-outro.md): Cinematic logo reveal with piece-by-piece assembly, glow bloom, tagline fade-in, and URL pill
- [macOS Notification](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/macos-notification.md): Animated macOS-style notification banner with app icon and message
- [macOS Tahoe Liquid Glass Desktop](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/macos-tahoe-liquid-glass.md): 3D MacBook with a macOS Tahoe-style desktop, glass menu bar, Finder window, dock, and cinematic device camera move.
- [North Korea Locked Down](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/north-korea-locked-down.md): Realistic map zoom into North Korea with a red scribble circle, locked-down pop-up label, and reddish editorial wash.
- [NYC Paris Flight](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/nyc-paris-flight.md): Apple-style realistic map animation with a plane flying from New York to Paris, marker circle, landing pop, and sound effects.
- [Reddit Post Card](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/reddit-post.md): Animated Reddit post card overlay with upvotes and comments
- [Ridged Burn](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/ridged-burn.md): Shader transition with ridged turbulence burn effect
- [Ripple Waves](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/ripple-waves.md): Shader transition with concentric ripple wave distortion
- [SDF Iris](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/sdf-iris.md): Shader transition with signed distance field iris reveal
- [Spain Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/spain-map.md): Animated Spain choropleth by autonomous community with staggered reveals and gradient legend — D3 conic conformal projection
- [Spotify Now Playing](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/spotify-card.md): Animated Spotify now-playing card with album art and progress bar
- [Swirl Vortex](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/swirl-vortex.md): Shader transition with swirling vortex distortion
- [Thermal Distortion](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/thermal-distortion.md): Shader transition with heat haze thermal distortion
- [TikTok Follow](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/tiktok-follow.md): Animated TikTok follow overlay with profile card and follow button
- [3D Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-3d.md): Showcase of 3D perspective flip and rotate transitions
- [Blur Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-blur.md): Showcase of blur-based transitions between scenes
- [Cover Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-cover.md): Showcase of cover/uncover slide transitions
- [Destruction Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-destruction.md): Showcase of destructive break-apart transitions
- [Dissolve Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-dissolve.md): Showcase of dissolve and fade transitions
- [Distortion Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-distortion.md): Showcase of warp and distortion transitions
- [Grid Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-grid.md): Showcase of grid-based tile transitions
- [Light Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-light.md): Showcase of light-based glow and flash transitions
- [Mechanical Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-mechanical.md): Showcase of mechanical shutter and iris transitions
- [Other Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-other.md): Showcase of miscellaneous creative transitions
- [Push Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-push.md): Showcase of push and slide transitions
- [Radial Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-radial.md): Showcase of radial wipe and reveal transitions
- [Scale Transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/transitions-scale.md): Showcase of scale and zoom transitions
- [3D UI Reveal](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/ui-3d-reveal.md): Perspective 3D reveal animation for UI elements
- [US Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/us-map.md): Animated US choropleth map with staggered state reveals, value labels, and gradient legend — pure inline SVG with GSAP
- [US Bubble Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/us-map-bubble.md): Animated US bubble map with proportional city markers, value callouts, and connection lines — composable with us-map
- [US Flow Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/us-map-flow.md): Animated connection arcs between US cities over a base map — composable origin-destination flow visualization
- [US Hex Grid Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/us-map-hex.md): Animated hexagonal tile grid map — each state as an equal-weight hex with data fill and abbreviation label
- [iPhone & MacBook 3D Showcase](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-iphone-device.md): Real GLTF iPhone 15 Pro Max and MacBook Pro models with live HTML-in-Canvas screen content, morphing glass lens, product review camera choreography, and 360° turntable.
- [Liquid Background](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-liquid-background.md): Organic liquid simulation with vertex displacement on a subdivided plane. HTML content floats above rippling fluid surface with real-time wave dynamics.
- [Magnetic](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-magnetic.md): VFX composition block
- [Portal](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-portal.md): VFX composition block
- [Shatter](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-shatter.md): VFX composition block
- [VFX Text Cursor](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vfx-text-cursor.md): Dramatic text reveal with cursor glow, chromatic shadow rays, and directional lighting on a black stage. Canvas-based shader post-processing with spectral color edges.
- [VPN YouTube Spot](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/vpn-youtube-spot.md): Snappy Apple-style YouTube insert showing a phone finding and installing a friendly VPN app with sound effects.
- [Whip Pan](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/whip-pan.md): Shader transition simulating a fast camera whip pan
- [World Map](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/world-map.md): Animated world choropleth with country-by-country reveal, tooltip labels, and rotating globe inset — D3 Natural Earth projection
- [X Post Card](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/x-post.md): Animated X/Twitter post card overlay with engagement metrics
- [YouTube Lower Third](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/blocks/yt-lower-third.md): Animated YouTube subscribe lower third with avatar and channel info
- [Blend Difference](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-blend-difference.md): Auto-inverting text using mix-blend-mode: difference — flips between white and black per-pixel against the background
- [Clip Wipe](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-clip-wipe.md): Left-to-right clip-path wipe reveal per word
- [Editorial Emphasis](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-editorial-emphasis.md): Dual-font system with dramatic size contrast for emphasis words
- [Emoji Pop](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-emoji-pop.md): Emoji integration with stroked text and horizontal squeeze entrance
- [Glitch RGB](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-glitch-rgb.md): RGB chromatic aberration with CRT scanline overlay
- [Gradient Fill](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-gradient-fill.md): Gradient-clipped text with elastic bounce entrance
- [Highlight](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-highlight.md): Red background sweep behind each active word, TikTok-style
- [Kinetic Slam](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-kinetic-slam.md): Full-screen single-word display with alternating entrance directions
- [Matrix Decode](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-matrix-decode.md): Character scramble animation before text reveal
- [Neon Accent](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-neon-accent.md): Multi-color neon glow accents with wiggle drift animation
- [Neon Glow](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-neon-glow.md): Cyan and magenta neon glow with keyword accent colors
- [Parallax Layers](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-parallax-layers.md): Behind-subject 3D text layering with vertical stretch effect
- [Particle Burst](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-particle-burst.md): Keyword words trigger colored particle explosions
- [Pill Karaoke](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-pill-karaoke.md): Pill-shaped container with per-word karaoke color highlight
- [Texture](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-texture.md): Flowing texture mask over large uppercase text — ships with 6 textures (lava, marble, metal, wood, concrete, rock), configurable via the texture variable
- [Weight Shift](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/caption-weight-shift.md): Elegant font-weight transition between caption lines
- [Grain Overlay](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/grain-overlay.md): Animated film grain texture overlay using CSS keyframes — adds warmth and analog character to any composition
- [Grid Pixelate Wipe](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/grid-pixelate-wipe.md): Transition effect where the screen dissolves into a grid of squares that fade out with staggered timing — use between scenes
- [Morph Text](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/morph-text.md): Gooey text morph — cycles through an editable word list using SVG threshold + GSAP-driven blur for a fluid, satisfying transition effect
- [Parallax Unzoom](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/parallax-unzoom.md): Reveal transition — focus card scales down from full frame as siblings parallax in to form a grid (reverse of parallax-zoom)
- [Parallax Zoom](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/parallax-zoom.md): Center card scales up to fill the frame while siblings parallax outward — inspired by the eBay Playbook hero transition
- [Shimmer Sweep](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/shimmer-sweep.md): Animated light sweep across text or elements using a CSS gradient mask — ideal for AI accents and premium reveals
- [Texture Mask Text](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/texture-mask-text.md)
- [Vignette](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/catalog/components/vignette.md): Cinematic radial vignette overlay using a pure-CSS gradient — darkens the edges to pull focus toward the center
- [Changelog](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/changelog.md): Release notes for HyperFrames.
- [Adopters](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/community/adopters.md): Organizations using HyperFrames in production or actively evaluating it.
- [Compositions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/concepts/compositions.md): The fundamental building block of a Hyperframes video.
- [Data Attributes](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/concepts/data-attributes.md): Core attributes for controlling element timing and behavior.
- [Deterministic Rendering](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/concepts/determinism.md): Same input, identical output. Every time.
- [Frame Adapters](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/concepts/frame-adapters.md): Bring your own animation runtime to Hyperframes.
- [Variables](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/concepts/variables.md): Parameterize compositions so the same source can render different content.
- [Contributing](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing.md): How to contribute to Hyperframes.
- [Contributing to the Catalog](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing/catalog.md): How to add blocks and components to the HyperFrames registry.
- [Changelog process](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing/changelog-process.md): How HyperFrames drafts, reviews, and publishes release notes.
- [Release channels](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing/release-channels.md): How HyperFrames keeps alpha-only work out of stable releases.
- [Studio Manual DOM Editing](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing/studio-manual-dom-editing.md): What the Studio manual DOM editing inspector ships today, including capabilities, UX, and constraints.
- [Testing Local CLI Changes](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/contributing/testing-local-changes.md): How to test unreleased CLI changes outside the monorepo using your local build.
- [AWS Lambda](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/deploy/aws-lambda.md): Deploy distributed HyperFrames rendering to AWS Lambda and drive renders from a laptop or CI.
- [Cloud Rendering](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/deploy/cloud.md): Render a composition on HeyGen's hosted cloud — no local Chrome, no FFmpeg, no AWS to manage.
- [Google Cloud Run](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/deploy/gcp-cloud-run.md): Deploy distributed HyperFrames rendering to Google Cloud Run + Cloud Workflows, and drive renders from a laptop or CI.
- [Migrating to HyperFrames Lambda](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/deploy/migrating-to-hyperframes-lambda.md): Side-by-side mapping for adopters coming to HyperFrames from another one-command-deploy video renderer.
- [Templates on Lambda](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/deploy/templates-on-lambda.md): Render personalised template videos at scale on AWS Lambda using --variables and the lambda render-batch verb.
- [Examples](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/examples.md): Built-in examples for common video patterns. Hover to preview animations.
- [4K Rendering](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/4k-rendering.md): Render any composition to 4K (3840×2160) without rewriting it — the CLI supersamples a 1080p composition via Chrome's device scale factor.
- [Google Antigravity](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/antigravity.md): Set up HyperFrames in Google Antigravity — install skills, author compositions, and render video from the agent-first IDE.
- [Claude Design](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/claude-design.md): Create HyperFrames video drafts in Claude Design, then refine in any AI coding agent.
- [Common Mistakes](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/common-mistakes.md): Pitfalls that break Hyperframes compositions.
- [GitHub Copilot CLI](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/copilot-cli.md): Set up HyperFrames with GitHub Copilot CLI — install skills, invoke them with slash commands, and render video from the terminal.
- [Deploy](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/deploy.md): Run a Hyperframes preview + render API in the cloud from a one-click template.
- [Feedback Collection](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/feedback.md): How HyperFrames collects feedback, what data is collected, and how to opt out.
- [GSAP Animation](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/gsap-animation.md): Add animations to your Hyperframes compositions with GSAP.
- [HDR Rendering](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/hdr.md): Render compositions to HDR10 MP4 (BT.2020 PQ or HLG, 10-bit H.265) when sources contain HDR video or images.
- [HTML-in-Canvas](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/html-in-canvas.md): Render live HTML as WebGL textures — GPU shaders, 3D geometry, and cinematic effects on any DOM content.
- [Hyperframes vs Remotion](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/hyperframes-vs-remotion.md): Why we built Hyperframes, how it differs from Remotion in practice, and where each tool fits.
- [Keyframes & Arc Motion](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/keyframes.md): Edit GSAP keyframes visually in Studio — timeline diamonds, arc motion paths, and gesture recording.
- [Open Design](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/open-design.md): Create HyperFrames video drafts in Open Design — the open-source, BYOK Claude-Design alternative — then refine in any AI coding agent.
- [Performance](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/performance.md): How to keep preview playback smooth and diagnose expensive compositions.
- [The Pipeline](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/pipeline.md): The 7-step pipeline for producing any Hyperframes video: capture, design, script, storyboard, voiceover, build, validate.
- [Prompt Guide](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/prompting.md): How to prompt Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Google Antigravity, GitHub Copilot CLI, and other AI agents to author Hyperframes compositions — with copy-pasteable examples and vocabulary tables.
- [Remove Background (transparent video)](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/remove-background.md): Remove the background from a video or image and drop it into any composition as a transparent overlay.
- [Rendering](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/rendering.md): Render compositions to MP4, MOV, WebM, GIF, or PNG sequences locally or in Docker.
- [Timeline Editing](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/timeline-editing.md): What you can edit in the Studio timeline today, how those edits map back to HTML, and the current limitations.
- [Troubleshooting](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/troubleshooting.md): Solutions for common Hyperframes issues.
- [Video Components](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/video-components.md): Install production-ready video blocks and components from the HyperFrames catalog with one command — or contribute your own.
- [Video Editor Cheatsheet](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/video-editor-cheatsheet.md): Fast reference for video editors and creative people directing agents, cutting timing, tweaking layouts, previewing, and publishing HyperFrames projects.
- [Website to Video](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/guides/website-to-video.md): Capture any website and turn it into a production video with a single prompt.
- [Introduction](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/introduction.md): Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.
- [Launch Videos](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/launch-videos.md): Open-source HyperFrames compositions behind HeyGen's product launch videos — real production projects you can read, run, and remix.
- [@hyperframes/aws-lambda](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/aws-lambda.md): AWS Lambda and Step Functions adapter for distributed HyperFrames rendering.
- [CLI](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/cli.md): Create, preview, and render HTML video compositions from the command line.
- [@hyperframes/core](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/core.md): Types, HTML generation, runtime, and linter — the foundation every other package depends on.
- [@hyperframes/engine](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/engine.md): Seekable page-to-video capture engine using Chrome's BeginFrame API.
- [@hyperframes/gcp-cloud-run](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/gcp-cloud-run.md): Google Cloud Run and Workflows adapter for distributed HyperFrames rendering.
- [@hyperframes/player](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/player.md): Embeddable web component for playing HyperFrames compositions in any web page.
- [@hyperframes/producer](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/producer.md): Full HTML-to-video rendering pipeline with encoding, audio mixing, and Docker support.
- [@hyperframes/sdk](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/sdk.md): Headless, framework-neutral composition editing engine for agents and custom editors.
- [@hyperframes/shader-transitions](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/shader-transitions.md): WebGL shader transitions for HyperFrames scenes and compositions.
- [@hyperframes/studio](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/packages/studio.md): Visual composition editor with live preview, timeline view, and hot reload.
- [Quickstart](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/quickstart.md): Create, preview, and render your first Hyperframes video in under two minutes.
- [HTML Schema Reference](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/reference/html-schema.md): Complete reference for authoring Hyperframes HTML compositions.
- [Showcase](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/showcase.md): Finished HyperFrames videos you can watch, read, run, and remix.
- [Weekly updates](https://hyperframes.heygen.com/weekly-updates.md): Curated weekly highlights for HyperFrames.
